Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: An employee in the NCPL system.

name.description: The full name of the employee.

department.description: The department the employee works in.

avatar.description: URL to the employee's avatar image.

uploadedPhotos.description: Array of base64 strings or URLs for uploaded photos.

uploadedLogo.description: Base64 string or URL for the uploaded logo.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created this employee record.

email.description: The email address of the employee.

whatsapp.description: The WhatsApp number of the employee.
